sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23224 — Ancients
Maximian, First Reign (AD 286-310), as Senior Augustus. AE follis or BI nummus (27mm, 11.68 gm, 5h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 5/5, Silvering. Heraclea, 1st officina, AD 296-297. IMP C MA MAXIMIANV
sales.description:
Ancients
Maximian, First Reign (AD 286-310), as Senior Augustus. AE follis or BI nummus (27mm, 11.68 gm, 5h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 5/5, Silvering. Heraclea, 1st officina, AD 296-297. IMP C MA MAXIMIANVS P F AVG, laureate head of Maximian right / GENIO POPV-L-I ROMANI, Genius standing facing, modius on head left, nude save for chlamys over left shoulder, liquors flowing from patera in outstretched right hand, cornucopia cradled in left arm; HTA in exergue. RIC VI 17b.

Marcus Aurelius Valerius M...
